raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>2025 purchased item from XXXX for XXXX. Defective, sent back. Merchant refused to refund. I disputed with Citi Card and sent the attached documents proving the item had a free return, was authorized by vendor, and they received it back and they refused to listen and accept the nonsense nonanswer from vendor as to why they stole my monies. See all the documents proving my case.
